ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Paradise
ships.notes: In service. Sails from Port of Palm Beach to Key West and The Bahamas. Official about-us page: "Launched in May 2022 with the Margaritaville at Sea Paradise sailing from the Port of Palm Beach." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.

exp.overview: Paradise is the fleet's original, intimate island-in-motion, a laid-back, Jimmy Buffett-inspired ship built for short, no-fuss escapes where the party starts the moment you leave the dock. Signature restaurants, frozen margaritas, live island music and a beach-bar spirit run from the pool deck to the theater, all a quick sail from Florida.

dining.name: Fins Dining
dining.desc: The complimentary sit-down dining room, open for dinner with ocean views and island-inspired signature plates like Shrimp and Grits and Jimmy's Jambalaya.

dining.name: High Tide Market
dining.desc: A five-station food hall replacing the traditional buffet, Mexican Cutie Cantina (tacos, rice bowls), License to Chill Sandwich Shack, Slice of Paradise (desserts), Provisions Salads & More, and Frank & Lola's Pizzeria.

dining.name: Cheeseburger in Paradise Burger Bar
dining.desc: Build-your-own burgers and cold drinks at the 5 o'Clock Somewhere Bar and Grill on the pool deck, a nod to the Buffett classic.

dining.name: Margaritaville Coffee Shop
dining.desc: All-day gourmet coffee, cappuccinos and grab-and-go snacks.

dining.name: JWB Prime Steakhouse
dining.desc: An upscale, casually elegant a la carte steakhouse serving prime cuts and seafood (extra charge).

dining.name: Far Side Sushi
dining.desc: A la carte sushi rolls, small plates and hearty rice and ramen bowls in a bamboo-trimmed room (extra charge).

dining.name: In-Room Dining
dining.desc: Meals and bites delivered to your stateroom (extra charge).

activities.name: License to Chill Pool
activities.desc: The main pool deck hub, ringed by cabanas and the License to Chill Bar pouring frozen margaritas.

activities.name: 12 Volt Pool & 12 Volt Bar
activities.desc: An adults-only pool and refreshed stern bar with ocean views and Electric Margaritas, the quieter, grown-up corner of the deck.

activities.name: St. Somewhere Spa & Salon
activities.desc: Fleet-wide spa and salon for massages, treatments and beauty services.

activities.name: Margaritaville Casino
activities.desc: Action-packed gaming with slot machines, classic table games and sports betting, plus a Players Club loyalty program.

activities.name: Sun Deck Live Music & Sail Away Party
activities.desc: Caribbean bands, steel drums and DJ sets throughout the cruise, kicking off with a sail-away deck party (parrot mascot included).

activities.name: Games & Enrichment
activities.desc: Bingo, trivia, the Love and Marriage show, scavenger hunts, wine tastings and flair-bartending mixology demos.

entertainment.name: Stars on the Water Theater
entertainment.desc: The ship's primary showroom hosting the headline production shows.

entertainment.name: Radio Margaritaville: Live at Sea
entertainment.desc: A live musical celebration of all things Margaritaville, spanning genres and decades.

entertainment.name: Caribbean Heat
entertainment.desc: A high-energy stage show of tropical rhythms, dynamic dancers and jaw-dropping acrobatics.

entertainment.name: White Hot Neon Nights
entertainment.desc: A glowing deck party with pulsing lights, glow face paint, electrifying drinks and a live DJ.

entertainment.name: Hemisphere Nightclub & Keys on the Water
entertainment.desc: Late-night DJ sets spanning every genre, plus karaoke at Keys on the Water; Hemisphere Dancer craft-spirits piano bar for a mellower vibe.

exp.kids_family: Supervised, age-tiered kids programming so parents can slip away to the adults-only deck. Jolly Mon Kid's Club (ages 3-6): ocean-themed arts and crafts, interactive games, mascot visits and mermaid storytelling. Parakeets Kid's Club (ages 6-9): magic workshops, escape-room adventures and mini-DJ sessions. The Teen's Club (ages 13-17): video games, ping pong, dodgeball, scavenger hunts, poolside movie takeovers and exclusive nightclub events.
exp.who_for: Casual, fun-first cruisers chasing value: couples, friend groups, first-timers and families who want a short Bahamas or Key West getaway without a big-ship price or pace. Adults get a nightclub, casino, spa and an adults-only pool and bar; families get supervised kids clubs and poolside movies.

neighbourhoods.name: 5 o'Clock Somewhere pool deck
neighbourhoods.desc: The lively main deck anchored by the License to Chill Pool, 5 o'Clock Somewhere Bar and Grill and Cheeseburger in Paradise.

neighbourhoods.name: 12 Volt (adults-only)
neighbourhoods.desc: The adults-only stern retreat with its own pool and 12 Volt Bar.

exp.deploy_note: Sails from the Port of Palm Beach, Florida on short getaways to The Bahamas and Key West.

ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Islander
ships.notes: In service. Official about-us page: "expanded in June 2024 with the addition of the Margaritaville at Sea Islander, offering cruises from Port Tampa Bay." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.

exp.overview: Islander is the fleet's larger, purpose-built flagship, 12 passenger decks wrapped around a 14-story tropical atrium, home to the world's only three-story LandShark Bar. It layers six new dining concepts, eleven new bars and lounges, three pools, two live production shows and family water play onto the signature Margaritaville beach-bar spirit, so the days at sea are as much the point as the ports.

dining.name: Fins Dining
dining.desc: The complimentary main dining room serving all-new island plates like Avocado Lime Mahi Mahi and Deconstructed Cuban alongside signature Shrimp and Grits.

dining.name: Port of Indecision Buffet
dining.desc: Endless breakfast, lunch and dinner across entrees, chef stations, salads, sides and desserts.

dining.name: Mexican Cutie Cantina
dining.desc: Build-your-own street tacos and breakfast burritos by the 5 o'Clock Somewhere Pool.

dining.name: Cheeseburger in Paradise Burger Bar
dining.desc: Customizable burgers and beverages poolside at 5 o'Clock Somewhere.

dining.name: Frank & Lola's Pizzeria
dining.desc: Hand-tossed pizza near the buffet; whole pies can be sent to staterooms for an added charge.

dining.name: Margaritaville Coffee Shop
dining.desc: Cappuccinos, gourmet coffee, seasonal drinks and grab-and-go favorites.

dining.name: JWB Prime Steakhouse
dining.desc: A two-story a la carte steakhouse with the highest-quality ingredients and island charm (extra charge).

dining.name: Far Side Sushi
dining.desc: A sushi bar of inventive mashups and Signature Sea-Cuterie boards (extra charge).

dining.name: Island Eats
dining.desc: Adults-only ocean-bar bites, peel-and-eat shrimp, tuna nachos, crab salad (extra charge).

dining.name: Tiki Grill
dining.desc: Adults-only tropical plates served at The Tiki Bar at the ship's aft (extra charge).

dining.name: In-Room Dining
dining.desc: Breakfast and bites delivered to your stateroom (extra charge).

activities.name: LandShark Pool & LandShark Bar and Lookout
activities.desc: The energetic main pool anchored by the world's only three-story LandShark Bar, with two decks of shaded seating, a lookout tower and outdoor entertainment screens.

activities.name: 5 O'Clock Somewhere Pool
activities.desc: A laid-back pool with cabanas, complimentary poolside food and live island music at the Six String stage.

activities.name: The Tiki Pool
activities.desc: An adults-only (18+) tropical retreat at the aft with covered pavilion seating, wake views and sunset dining at the Tiki Bar.

activities.name: Caribbean Amphibian Splash and Slide
activities.desc: A family water-play area with slide (also referenced as the Caribbean Amphibian Play Pad and Slide).

activities.name: Paradise Pickleball at Sea
activities.desc: Two side-by-side pickleball courts on deck.

activities.name: Mini-golf & Cornhole
activities.desc: A Margaritaville-inspired mini-golf course and cornhole for casual deck play.

activities.name: St. Somewhere Spa & Salon
activities.desc: Fleet-wide spa and salon for treatments, massages and beauty services.

activities.name: Margaritaville Casino
activities.desc: Slots, table games and sports betting, with the adjacent Love and Luck Casino Bar.

entertainment.name: Stars On The Water Theater
entertainment.desc: A three-story showroom staging the ship's original live production shows.

entertainment.name: Conky Tonkin' at Sea
entertainment.desc: A country-themed spectacular with headliners and ensemble blending contemporary and classic country favorites, Nashville-style.

entertainment.name: Caribbean Heat Remix
entertainment.desc: An amplified take on the Margaritaville favorite, electrifying dance, acrobatics and the beats of Key West and Mexico.

entertainment.name: Radio Margaritaville: Live at Sea
entertainment.desc: A live musical celebration of all things Margaritaville spanning genres and decades.

entertainment.name: Boots and Bubbles
entertainment.desc: A dress-to-impress coastal-country evening: the Conky Tonkin' show, a captain's margarita toast, line-dancing classes and champagne-and-bourbon dining.

entertainment.name: Rock the Trop
entertainment.desc: A yacht-rock-meets-tropical celebration with daytime scavenger hunts and character meet-and-greets, then the Caribbean Heat Remix show, DJ and nightclub.

entertainment.name: Nightlife venues
entertainment.desc: The two-story Hot, Hot, Hot Night Club, Coral Reef Lounge karaoke, Havana Daydreamin' sports bar and Bubbles Up champagne bar keep the evenings going.

exp.kids_family: The most family-loaded ship in the fleet, with a full age ladder of supervised clubs plus a character breakfast. Jolly Mon Kid's Club (ages 3-6): ocean-themed arts and crafts, interactive games, mascot visits and mermaid storytelling. Parakeets Kid's Club (ages 6-9): magic workshops, escape rooms and mini-DJ sessions. The Hangout Tween's Club (ages 10-12): trivia, board games, jewelry making, DJ Academy and glow parties. The Teen's Club (ages 13-17): video games, ping pong, dodgeball, scavenger hunts, poolside movie takeovers and teen nightclub events. Plus the pre-purchase 'Parrots, Pirates and Pancakes' character breakfast.
exp.who_for: Casual, fun-loving travelers who want more ship and a longer trip at an easygoing pace and price: families drawn to the water slide, tween and teen clubs and character breakfast, and adults who want three pools (one adults-only), a two-story nightclub, a champagne bar and a sports lounge. Great for value-minded cruisers wanting Key West, Mexico and Caribbean sailings out of Tampa.

neighbourhoods.name: 14-story tropical atrium
neighbourhoods.desc: The soaring central heart of the ship, home to the Flip Flop Atrium Bar and signature cocktails.

neighbourhoods.name: LandShark Pool deck
neighbourhoods.desc: The lively main pool zone under the three-story LandShark Bar and Lookout.

neighbourhoods.name: 5 O'Clock Somewhere Pool
neighbourhoods.desc: The relaxed poolside zone with the Six String live-music stage and complimentary food.

neighbourhoods.name: The Tiki (adults-only aft)
neighbourhoods.desc: The 18-and-up aft retreat with the Tiki Pool, Tiki Bar and Tiki Grill overlooking the wake.

exp.deploy_note: Sails from Port Tampa Bay, Florida on longer voyages to Key West, Mexico and the Caribbean.
